nasb.text: Sow with a view to righteousness, Reap in accordance with kindness; Break up your fallow ground, For it is time to seek the Lord Until He comes to rain righteousness on you.

esv.text: Sow for yourselves righteousness; reap steadfast love; break up your fallow ground, for it is the time to seek the Lord, that he may come and rain righteousness upon you.

cnv.text: 你們要為自己撒種公義， 就能收割慈愛的果子， 你們要翻鬆荒地。 現在是尋求耶和華的時候， 直等到他來，降下公義的雨在你們身上。

ccb.text: 你们要为自己种植公义， 就能收获慈爱。 现在是寻求耶和华的时候， 你们要犁开刚硬的心田， 等祂来使公义如雨浇灌你们。
